title: Korak 38

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
text = 'Hello World'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''
for char in text.lower():
    index = alphabet.find(char)
    new_index = index + shift
    encrypted_text = alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text)
challengeFiles.seed:
text = 'Hello World'
shift = 3
alphabet = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'
encrypted_text = ''
for char in text.lower():
    index = alphabet.find(char)
    new_index = index + shift
    encrypted_text = alphabet[new_index]
    print('char:', char, 'encrypted text:', encrypted_text)

tests.text: Treba da postaviš vrednost encrypted_text + alphabet[new_index] za svoje promene encrypted_text.

description: Umesto postavljanja vrednosti alphabet[new_index] za encrypted_text, postavite trenutnu vrednost encrypted_text zajedno sa alphabet[new_index] za ove promene.
